# iaas_image (Data Source)

Looks up an OS image by name via the image-search catalogue. Matches the image's display text exactly first, then falls back to a unique case-insensitive substring match. Exactly one image must resolve.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an OS image by name. Optionally scope the search to a location
# (hypervisor group) to only consider images available there.
data "iaas_image" "ubuntu" {
  name = "Ubuntu 24.04"

  # hypervisor_group_id = data.iaas_location.nyc.id # optional search scope
}

output "image_id" {
  value = data.iaas_image.ubuntu.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the image to look up (e.g. `Ubuntu 24.04`). Matched against the catalogue's display text. Exactly one image must resolve.

### Optional

- `hypervisor_group_id` (String) Optional hypervisor group (location) UUID to scope the search to images available at that location.

### Read-Only

- `distro` (String) Distribution family of the matched image (e.g. `ubuntu`).
- `id` (String) UUID of the matched image.
